data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data encryption in transit and at rest to safeguard user data.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Robust IAM practices to control and monitor access to resources.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS IAM policies and SSO for centralized access control.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Preventative measures to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Employs AWS Shield and AWS WAF for comprehensive protection.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Systems in place to detect and respond to threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Amazon GuardDuty and in-house threat detection algorithms.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: Dedicated team and systems for rapid response to security incidents.
data.technical_spec: 24/7 Security Operations Center (SOC) and automated alerts.
